profile.name: Gustavo Toral
profile.title: IT & Cybersecurity Professional
profile.summary: Career changer with 6+ months of intensive IT study, 4 CompTIA/AWS certifications, and hands-on lab projects. Background in sales and marketing — now focused on breaking into cybersecurity.

certifications.name: AWS Solutions Architect – Associate
certifications.notes: Next target after landing first role

projects.name: Active Directory Home Lab
projects.description: Built and configured an AD environment on Windows Server. Documented and resolved real issues including a DHCP misconfiguration and a static IP conflict.
projects.highlight: Documented real troubleshooting scenarios — not just a clean setup

projects.name: AWS S3 + CloudFront Static Site
projects.description: Deployed a static portfolio website on AWS. Debugged two real configuration errors: 504 Gateway Timeout from wrong S3 endpoint, and a blank page from missing default root object.
projects.highlight: Real debugging — not a tutorial walkthrough

projects.name: SIEM Incident Response Simulator
projects.description: Built a React-based SIEM simulator for Security+ exam prep and portfolio demonstration. Simulates real alert triage and incident response workflows.
projects.highlight: Built to demonstrate SOC analyst thinking

projects.name: Security Controls Implementation Lab
projects.description: Windows Server 2022 environment implementing NTFS permissions, least privilege principles, and security controls documentation.
projects.highlight: Mapped directly to CompTIA Security+ objectives

projects.name: Serverless Contact Form (Lambda + SES)
projects.description: AWS serverless contact form using Lambda, API Gateway, and SES. Built to extend cloud skills beyond static hosting.
projects.highlight: Shows progression from static to dynamic cloud architecture

timeline.event: Started cloud & network security program at The Academy Miami
